arts.ttl: Kompany's Celtic nightmare in front of Fergie made him a Man City hero as he prepares to storm Parkhead 'fortress'
arts.sum: The Belgian opened up on Arnge Engels and Brendan Rodgers ahead of the Champions League showdown at Parkhead

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany could be toying with lineup changes vs. Celtic
arts.sum: Vincent Kompany is considering giving Kim Min-jae and Dayot Upamecano a rest against Celtic tomorrow. With the fresh blood coming back into the squad, Bayern Munich boss Vincent Kompany could be kicking around the idea of resting some players or moving some others around.

arts.ttl: Thomas Muller fires Celtic a light hearted warning but it's not about him – 'the GOAT is ready for Glasgow'
arts.sum: The superstars of Bayern Munich have touched down ahead of the Champions League play-off first-leg showdown

arts.ttl: Celtic star dubbed best pound-for-pound Champions League pick ahead of Michael Olise and Phil Foden
arts.sum: Celtic’s Nicolas Kuhn is the Champions League’s best pound-for-pound pick If Kuhn can replicate the performance he produced against Leipzig against Bayern, then Celtic will have a serious chance of winning, especially with Daizen Maeda available to play .

arts.ttl: Bavarian Podcast Works — Preview Show: Celtic vs. Bayern Munich (Champions League)
arts.sum: Bayern Munich is off to Scotland to face Celtic FC in a match that many are eagerly anticipating. A look at the rosters and injuries for Celtic and Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers wants Bayern hurt in Celtic Park cauldron as footballing royalty won't get the red carpet treatment
arts.sum: The Hoops boss respects Bayern's standing in the game but has urged his men to make them suffer in Glasgow

arts.ttl: Have Celtic ever beaten Bayern Munich? How Brendan Rodgers stands on brink of history
arts.sum: So much history is on the line for Brendan Rodgers as he could become the first Celtic manager to win a knockout round leg in the Champions League era. Celtic are preparing for their first Champions League knockout game for the first time in 12 years this week.

arts.ttl: Who will win Celtic vs Bayern Munich? Our writers deliver their predictions for Champions League blockbuster
arts.sum: It's a massive night under the lights at Parkhead as the Hoops welcome a huge Euro heavyweight to Glasgow

arts.ttl: Ex-Celtic boss faces scrutiny to adapt tactics, injuries can’t justify Spurs’ woes
arts.sum: Former Celtic boss Ange Postecoglou previously insisted that he always wins silverware in the second season at a new club.

arts.ttl: Auston Trusty explains what point Celtic stars want to prove against Harry Kane and Bayern Munich in Champions League
arts.sum: He will come up against one of the world’s best strikers in the form of Harry Kane who has notched 28 goals in as many games for the Bundesliga giants this term. Trusty has been a solid defensive partner for Cameron Carter-Vickers and Liam Scales at times and he hopes to continue that against Bayern when the two clubs do battle tomorrow evening.
